title: ViewCatalog
description: Per-view catalog file produced by setup-ddl. Contains outbound references and inbound dependents.

ddl_hash.description: SHA-256 of normalized source DDL. Used for diff-aware reexport.

stale.description: True when the object was present in a prior extraction but absent in the latest.

excluded.description: When true, the object is excluded from the migration pipeline and skipped by batch scheduling.

references.description: Outbound: what this view depends on.

is_materialized_view.description: True when this view is a materialized view (Oracle MV or SQL Server indexed view). MVs are treated like tables for scoping/migration.

columns.description: Column definitions. Present only for materialized views (physical storage).

sql_type.description: Formatted SQL type, e.g. NVARCHAR(50), BIGINT

primary_keys.description: Primary key constraints. Present only for materialized views.

unique_indexes.description: Unique indexes. Present only for materialized views.

scoping.description: SQL analysis results from analyzing-view skill. Written by discover write-scoping.

status.description: analyzed = sql_elements populated and persisted; error = DDL parse or CLI failure

sql_elements.description: SQLglot-extracted SQL features from the view SELECT body. Null when needs_llm is true.

detail.description: Human-readable detail, e.g. join target or function names

call_tree.description: Direct source references resolved from catalog refs.

logic_summary.description: LLM-written plain-language description of what the view computes.

warnings.description: VIEW_DEPENDS_ON_VIEWS — view references other views; profiling-view should classify dependencies first.

errors.description: DDL_PARSE_ERROR — sqlglot failed; CLI_ERROR — discover write-scoping exited non-zero.

profile.description: Classification result from profiling-view skill. Written by profile write.

refactor.description: Written by the refactoring-sql skill via refactor write, and enriched by refactor sweep.

status.description: ok = refactored SQL produced and audit passed; partial = audit failed; error = could not proceed.

extracted_sql.description: Core transformation SELECT extracted from the view SQL body.

refactored_sql.description: Refactored CTE SQL (import/logical/final pattern) that passed the equivalence audit.

shared_sources.description: Source table FQNs shared with other objects in the same refactor batch. Written by refactor sweep.

test_gen.description: Test generation summary written by test-harness write. Not present until after test generation.

test_spec_path.description: Relative path to the test-spec JSON file, e.g. test-specs/silver.dimcustomer.json

branches.description: Number of test branches in the test spec.

unit_tests.description: Number of unit tests in the test spec.

generate.description: dbt model generation summary written by migrate write. Not present until after model generation.

model_path.description: Relative path to the generated dbt model SQL file.

schema_yml.description: Whether a schema YAML entry exists for this model.

compiled.description: Whether dbt compile succeeded for this model.

tests_passed.description: Whether dbt test passed for this model.

parse_error.description: sqlglot parse error message, if the view DDL failed to parse.

warnings.description: Diagnostic warnings detected during catalog enrichment.

errors.description: Diagnostic errors detected during catalog enrichment.
